title: Ashfall Murder at Blackfen
setting: A rain-choked marsh town where volcanic ash falls from a distant, waking caldera.
tone: gothic mystery, tense investigation, grounded danger
rules: Clues should create pressure rather than solve the mystery outright.
Every suspect should have one truthful motive and one misleading secret.

locations.name: Blackfen Inn
locations.description: A peat-smoke inn where the victim's sealed room overlooks the flooded causeway.

locations.name: Ash Chapel
locations.description: A half-buried chapel whose bell rings when no one touches it.

factions.name: Reeve's Guard
factions.description: Undermanned local officers trying to keep panic out of the streets.

faction_identity.public_goal: identify the killer before the next market day
faction_identity.hidden_goal: hide evidence that the guard lost the victim's confiscated ledger

factions.name: Cinder Veil
factions.description: A rumor-shrouded sect blamed for every strange ashfall in Blackfen.

faction_identity.hidden_goal: recover a relic hidden inside the victim's ledger

npcs.name: Mara Vale
npcs.description: The innkeeper who found the body and remembers more than she wants to say.

role_identity.motivation: protect her family from being blamed
role_identity.worldview: truth is useful only when it survives the powerful
role_identity.fear: the guard will discover her forged alibi
role_identity.desire: get the investigation away from the inn

npcs.name: Sergeant Orrin Pike
npcs.description: A guard sergeant who wants the case closed before outsiders arrive.

role_identity.motivation: preserve civic order and his own career
role_identity.worldview: a messy truth can be worse than a clean lie
role_identity.fear: the missing ledger exposes his negligence
role_identity.desire: pin the murder on a believable suspect
boundaries: will not confess unless cornered by evidence

quests.title: Find the Killer
quests.description: Investigate the sealed-room murder before Blackfen chooses its own culprit.

secrets.text: The victim's ledger contained a pressed black-glass relic wanted by the Cinder Veil.
reveal_conditions: the player finds ash sealed between the ledger pages

secrets.text: Sergeant Orrin lost the confiscated ledger before the murder was discovered.
reveal_conditions: the player compares guard evidence logs with inn witness timing

clocks.title: Blackfen turns on a suspect
clocks.consequence: A public accusation triggers violence before the mystery is solved.
